$comment: Code<->Figma contract for the ALPHA primitives (PEA-219 reorg). Code carries ONLY the alpha rungs the semantic layer actually consumes (5 of Figma's 30 — the other 25 are intentionally not-ported per the no-tokens-for-hypothetical-needs rule; add a rung here + in primitives.json when a semantic token needs it). 8-digit hex = RRGGBBAA. Figma home post-merge: the `primitives` collection, alpha/ group (sibling of color/, mirroring code primitives.{color,alpha}); pre-merge: the `alpha (primitive)` collection as white|black/alpha-N. check_primitive_drift.mjs asserts: code alpha set == this snapshot (bijection), hex match, AND two-way usage (every {primitives.alpha.*} reference in light/dark.json is snapshotted; every snapshot rung is consumed by at least one semantic token). CI can't reach Figma live — refresh via use_figma per CONVENTIONS.md §8.
